Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Two sisters who were once tight are now torn apart. Silcray claims her younger sister stole her belongings. Sylvia is shocked and appaled that she'd be accused of such claims after taking her sister into her home.
Video.title: The Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Friends-turned-lovers Kemuel and Bridget struggle to take their relationship to the next level due to a lack of trust.
Video.title: Crossty vs. Lovelace

Video.summary: Yashira seeks to prove that Gregory is the father of her 4-year-old after years of doubt and speculation.
Video.title: Guadalupe vs. Phillips

Video.summary: A messy breakup leads to a heated dispute over car damage, cheating accusations and a demand for compensation.
Video.title: Dooley vs. Sanders

Video.summary: The plaintiff wants her friend to repay her for a loan; the defendant says she used the money for her daughter's prom, but the plaintiff and her friends broke out into a fight and destroyed the venue, so she has refused to repay her.
Video.title: Prom Night

Video.summary: McKenzie is suing her baby's father for the price of a car because he chooses work and football over family.
Video.title: Football Over Family

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after she found a provocative message from another woman in her live-in boyfriend's phone, he became violent, and she was forced to hide in a closet; she sues him for repayment of loans; he says she was the aggressor.
Video.title: Live-In Liar

Video.summary: California model Nicole sues her ex-boyfriend Peter for property exchange of their pet dog that he kept after the breakup.
Video.title: Serrano vs. Plemons

Video.summary: With the help of an expert witness, the judges address the extravagant spending habits in Ayahna and Clarence's marriage.
Video.title: James vs. James

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: Symoan and Hillary seek answers from the Cutlers' compatibility test in an effort to save their 10-year marriage.
Video.title: Willis vs. Greene

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: Past infidelity and the discovery of a homoerotic dating profile have husband and wife Laffiama and Amy feuding in court.
Video.title: Murillo vs. Murillo

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: A series of red flags and an old hometown fling have Danielle questioning her boyfriend's loyalty.
Video.title: Parker vs. Riley

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Pye sues ex-boyfriend Santiel for the return of her safe keys, saying stole them post-breakup.
Video.title: Powell-Woods vs. Chambers

Video.summary: A haunted doll and accusations of witchcraft have a formerly married couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Smith vs. Johnston

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: Exes Caerya and James meet in court to settle a three-year debate over their son's paternity.
Video.title: Cox vs. Carswell

Video.summary: A young couple battle over responsibility and paternity, with shocking truths waiting to be revealed in court.
Video.title: Caldwell-Roach vs. Roach

Video.summary: Tempers flare when feuding families draw a line down the middle of Raven and Daniel's tumultuous three-year relationship.
Video.title: Briggs vs. Tate

Video.summary: When addiction leads to a family tragedy, the Butlers turn to the judges to learn how to work through their marital issues.
Video.title: Butler vs Butler

Video.summary: Sarah is suing her former friend for the bail money that she posted for him.
Video.title: Bail Bonds Break Bonds

Video.summary: Michael, a clown and Elvis Presley impersonator, is suing his talent agent for unpaid dues.
Video.title: Bonzo and the Hound Dog

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: BFFs Earl and Demoun brawl over stolen sushi. But when Demoun put away his fist, he took out his hammer!
Video.title: Fish and Hammer

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: This car-crazy sister claims she was scammed by her big brother's bogus paint job, and wants her money back.
Video.title: The Big Bro Botch

Video.summary: Friends Matt and James said everything was ok until their other roommate, David, turned into Goliath and became a violent religious fanatic, slinging shoes and punching faces.
Video.title: The Christian Crusader

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Ronald and Rhonda let a kitchen renovation bring out the worst in eachother.
Video.title: Relationship Renovations

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: Comedian Allan Cunningham is suing his former fan for the money she owes him for a private party.
Video.title: Heckling the Plaintiff

Video.summary: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car.
Video.title: Car Troubles

Video.summary: Pablo and Stepanie's relationship was all about the sex. But her change in hormones made him moan.
Video.title: Turning Her Freak Off

Video.summary: Florence sues Lora, claiming the puppy she bought from her shop, Harley, was sick and cost $1,600 in vet bills. Lora insists the puppy was healthy at sale and denies responsibility for its condition after four months.
Video.title: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Image.alt: You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!
You Sold Me a Sick Dog!

Video.summary: Corinne sues ex-boss Walter for $5,000, claiming unpaid wages, harassment, and abuse. Walter denies the claims, asserting he paid her and countersues for $545.04, accusing her of a shakedown.
Video.title: Harassed by Her Boss?

Video.summary: Dwayne sues his niece and her husband for $2,570, claiming they damaged his apartment and owe rent. The defendants argue the apartment had lead paint, harmed their child, and they paid in full. They countersue for $3,000 in damages.
Video.title: Family Feuding Over Rental

Video.summary: Ansyl is suing his former tenant for two months' rent saying she was working as a prostitute while renting.
Video.title: Ransacked by a Landlord

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: A man says his ex vandalized his van, and while they were dating, she punched him in the face and ended up in jail.
Video.title: Trading Punches

Video.summary: After Vera's son was murdered in 2014, she learned that Alstin may be her grandson, and wants a DNA test.
Video.title: Seeking Her Grandson
